notes: The trusted fixture builder knows means only to construct and score the oracle; the algorithm receives only the canonical oracle, k, and public precision/shot limits.
The baseline executes charged measured QPE per arm, a complete direct membership relation, and rank compute-copy-uncompute without QRAM.
The tie fixture must fail closed; no arbitrary tie-breaking counts as strict exact Top-k success.
This panel validates a legal semantic comparator, not a coherent unknown-boundary advantage algorithm.
